items.title: Can confirm that Andre Drummond is coming to the Knicks, per league sources.
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt:
Can confirm that Andre Drummond is coming to the Knicks, per league sources. 

The Big Penguin provides the size, veteran experience and rebounding (statistically one of the best ever) that the Knicks need and were looking for with Robinson gone.

Also, good locker room guy.

items.title: Andre Drummond's corner three-point shooting last season was one of the more fun subplots of a Sixers season I have covered. He made a career-high three of them in Madison Square Garden, then seemed surprised that anybody was surprised. That is now his home arena.

Zaccharie Risacher finished with 9 points (2-4 on twos, 1-2 on threes, 2-3 on free throws), 1 rebound, 1 blocked shot and was +9 in 16 minutes of action in France's World Cup qualifier win over Belgium today.

France used 12 players and no one played more than 24 minutes.

items.title: I’m quite enjoying this euro play-by-play announcer
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
I’m quite enjoying this euro play-by-play announcer 

“The stop and the pop but not the drop” - when a player misses a pull up transition three

“Goes behind the spine” - behind the back dribble  

“The guests” - the away team 

“The hosts” - the home team

items.title: COLUMN: The Blazers' handling of Micah Nori's contract has stuck with me. The decision is another example of the organization prioritizing penny-pinching over the baseline of respect the NBA has established for its workers.
items.author: Conor Bergin
items.body_excerpt:
COLUMN: The Blazers' handling of Micah Nori's contract has stuck with me. The decision is another example of the organization prioritizing penny-pinching over the baseline of respect the NBA has established for its workers.

That's unacceptable, and it shouldn't be controversial to say it.
